title: Video Segment example survey
description: A minimal survey demonstrating the videoSegment custom question type introduced in plugin v1.4.7 and finalized in v1.4.8. The question is a standalone custom widget (not derived from the image question). The URL goes into 'videoUrl'; layout is controlled by 'videoFit' / 'videoHeight' / 'videoWidth'.

elements.name: intro_html
elements.html: Please watch the highlighted excerpt of the video below. Playback is restricted to the configured range. You can pause, resume, and seek freely inside that range; replays restart from the beginning of the segment.

elements.name: watched_completely
elements.title: Did you watch the full segment?
